channel.title: Eduard Hvizdak — Blog
channel.description: Writing on AI engineering, building SaaS, hackathons, and life by Eduard Hvizdak.

item.title: Newsmatics Hackathon
item.description: I spent a hackathon with team MOGGERS building Newsmatics Globe — a pipeline that pulls locations out of news articles and plots them on an interactive 3D globe.

item.title: Talking the Digital Fairness Act with Commissioner McGrath
item.description: I joined a European Commission Youth Policy Dialogue in Ljubljana with EU Commissioner Michael McGrath, working through what the upcoming Digital Fairness Act should actually do.

item.title: Zero to Done: Pitching InzerPro at a Startup-Build Hackathon
item.description: A weekend in Brno at Zero to Done — the first run of a startup-build hackathon where the goal was real customers, not a demo. I brought InzerPro, and it was one of the best events I have done.

item.title: Erasmus+ Bridges, Not Walls Experience
item.description: We took part in the Bridges not Walls Erasmus+ youth exchange in Lithuania — a week of non-formal education, cultural nights, and human connection across six countries.
